title: DisableTotems
description: Simple LightWeight plugin to disable Totem of Undying on your server.
body:
**DISABLETOTEMS**
![DisableTotems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9458651462587ffd5ecddf91e4cfcc5be0bba8a8.png)
- ✅ lightweight
- ✅ configurable message
Config.yml:

```
# -----------------------
# DisableTotems config file
# author: aphonix
# discord: https://discord.gg/zYVtWxEar8
# -----------------------

DisableTotemMessage: "&b&l[DT] &fTOTEM_OF_UNDYING is disabled on this server."
```
